evals.prompt: Create a topic with a submit key, subscribe to it via mirror node, and then publish 5 JSON event messages. Write the full Node.js script using @hiero-ledger/sdk.
evals.expected_output: A complete Node.js script that creates a topic, subscribes via TopicMessageQuery, and publishes structured JSON messages.

assertions.name: sets-submit-key
assertions.description: Sets a submit key on the topic

assertions.name: signs-with-submit-key
assertions.description: Freezes and signs with submit key since topic has one

evals.prompt: I need to submit a large message (~5KB) to an HCS topic and make sure all chunks go through. Show me how to use executeAll and verify each chunk's receipt.
evals.expected_output: A script demonstrating chunked message submission with executeAll and receipt verification per chunk.

assertions.name: uses-execute-all
assertions.description: Uses executeAll() to get all chunk responses

assertions.name: mentions-sequence-number
assertions.description: Checks or logs the sequence number from receipts

evals.prompt: Write a script that creates a topic with a 1 Hbar custom fee per message, then submits a message as a different account (not the operator) with a custom fee limit set.
evals.expected_output: A script showing topic creation with custom fees and message submission with fee limits from a non-operator account.

assertions.name: uses-custom-fixed-fee
assertions.description: Uses CustomFixedFee for the per-message fee

assertions.name: sets-fee-schedule-key
assertions.description: Sets fee schedule key on the topic

assertions.name: creates-separate-account
assertions.description: Creates a separate account to submit from

assertions.name: switches-operator
assertions.description: Switches client operator to the new account
